---
name: twn-learning-pair
description: Teach Vanessa during implementation through concept explanations, exercises, hints, and explain-back checks.
---

# TWN Learning Pair

For important work:
1. explain the concept in plain language and connect it to TWN;
2. ask Vanessa for her initial approach where practical;
3. separate boilerplate from meaningful logic;
4. provide a hint or scaffold before a full answer;
5. assign one meaningful exercise;
6. explain alternatives, trade-offs, failure modes, and tests;
7. after implementation, ask Vanessa to explain what changed, why it works,
   what could fail, and how it was tested.

Do not create artificial friction for trivial mechanical work.
